ai.title: AI Tax Consultant
ai.unavailable_message: The AI Tax Consultant is currently unavailable. All bookkeeping features work normally.
ai.welcome: Welcome! I'm your AI Tax Consultant. Ask me about BTW (VAT), income tax, corporate tax, deductions, or ask me to analyze your books. I have direct access to your accounting data.
ai.placeholder: Ask a question about taxes or your books...
ai.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
ai.suggest.btw_q1: What's my BTW liability for Q1?
ai.no_insights_desc: No proactive insights at the moment. Add more transactions so the AI can identify patterns.
dash.welcome_subtitle: Your bookkeeping, simple and clear. Let's get started.
dash.step_create_entity_desc: We'll start with the basics: your business name, chamber of commerce number, and type.
dash.step_connect_bank_desc: Import your transactions so we can keep track of everything automatically.
dash.step_first_transaction_desc: Or scan a receipt — we'll handle the rest.
dash.step_setup_invoicing_desc: Create professional invoices and track who still owes you.
dash.quick_actions: What do you want to do?
dash.no_activity: No transactions yet. Start by recording your first one!
dash.tip_scanner: You can scan receipts with your phone camera. The AI automatically recognizes the amount, date, and vendor.
dash.tip_ai: The AI Advisor can help you with VAT filing, deductions, and tax optimization. Just ask!
dash.tip_bank: Connect your bank to automatically import transactions. Saves hours of manual entry.
dash.btw_deadline: VAT filing is due in {days} days
entity.no_transactions: No transactions yet. Record your first one →
entity.zzp_tip: As a freelancer, you may qualify for the self-employed deduction and starter's deduction. Ask the AI Advisor!
entity.bv_tip: Don't forget to record your DGA salary. The AI Advisor can calculate the optimal amount.
entity.holding_tip: Use entity relationships to link your holding to your operating company.
entity.personal_tip: Keep personal expenses separate from business expenses. It saves stress at tax time.
empty.journal: No transactions yet. Add your first expense or income →
empty.invoices: No invoices yet. Create your first invoice →
empty.banking: No banking data yet. Connect your bank account to get started →
empty.reports: Not enough data for reports yet. Add some transactions first.
